name: webidl-book-library-wasm
description: Example WebAssembly component showcasing WIT interfaces auto-generated from WebIDL

scripts.build: jco componentize librarian.js --wit wit/ --world-name component --out librarian.wasm --disable all
scripts.all: pnpm run generate:wit && pnpm run generate:types && pnpm run build && pnpm run transpile && node demo.js
